label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 13

extraction.one_line_summary: SENECHAL Florian won from unexpected lead position after JACOBSEN flatted/missed position and KRIEGER led out without MØLLER following.
tactical_patterns: Intermediate sprint at 11km created positioning chaos before technical finale at 3.2km, disrupting normal leadout trains.
Deceuninck-QuickStep's leadout train dissolved in turns near 3km marker, forcing improvised Senechal-Trentin duel instead of Jacobsen sprint.
GC teams actively fighting for position in sprint stage technical zones suggests 3km rule paranoia trumping energy conservation.

rider_signals.JACOBSEN Fabio: negative: lost position in turns near 3km mark, possible puncture, couldn't contest sprint despite Deceuninck controlling race
rider_signals.SENECHAL Florian: positive: opportunistically took victory from leadout role when Jacobsen disappeared, shows finishing speed beyond domestique duties
rider_signals.KRIEGER Alexander: neutral: led out strongly but MØLLER didn't follow wheel, revealing UAE sprint coordination breakdown
rider_signals.MØLLER Sasha: negative: failed to follow Krieger's leadout wheel in final, suggesting positioning error or lack of legs
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: shaking head crossing line mixed with sprint pack, possibly indicating positioning struggle or general form concerns
